title: OrePlants
description: Ore Plants in Minecraft! That's it!
body:
## Ore Plant

### Currently: Working!

#### The Farmers Way Of Obtaining Metals? Make A Crop.

Craft your Metal Seeds. Grow the Crops. Harvest your Metals!

Seeds Recipes in the Gallery.
Use Metal Dust to craft Ingots of each kind.

- Recipe:
  - Iron- / Gold- / Diamond Ingot/Crystal = 9 Dust
  - Iron / Gold Seeds = X form of eachs nugget
  - Diamond Seed = Gallery for the recipe

--------
### If you want to use this in your Modpack, feel free to do so. No Credits needed but it's always appreciated!

Check out the Modpack i made where this mod is in use!
- https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-farm
